---
title: "`r params$run_title`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    self_contained: true
params:
  out_dir: "."
  dnmb_dir: !r NULL
  run_title: "DNMBcluster run"
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6)
library(ggplot2)
out_dir <- params$out_dir
# Best-effort lookup for the upstream DNMB processed/ dir when caller
# does not supply one. Try: sibling ../dnmb, ../../dnmb, and out_dir/dnmb.
find_dnmb_dir <- function() {
  if (!is.null(params$dnmb_dir) && dir.exists(params$dnmb_dir)) return(params$dnmb_dir)
  cand <- c(
    file.path(dirname(out_dir), "dnmb"),
    file.path(dirname(dirname(out_dir)), "dnmb"),
    file.path(out_dir, "dnmb")
  )
  hit <- cand[vapply(cand, dir.exists, logical(1))]
  if (length(hit)) hit[1] else NA_character_
}
dnmb_dir <- find_dnmb_dir()
```

## Run summary

```{r overview}
ogs_tsv <- file.path(out_dir, "orthogroup_trees.tsv")
sc_tsv  <- file.path(out_dir, "single_copy_OGs.tsv")
sp_nwk  <- file.path(out_dir, "species_tree_rooted.nwk")
hogs    <- list.files(file.path(out_dir, "HOGs"), pattern = "\\.tsv$",
                      full.names = TRUE)

summary_df <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Total OGs (aln + tree built)",
             "Single-copy OGs",
             "HOG tables",
             "Species tree present"),
  value = c(
    if (file.exists(ogs_tsv))
      sum(!is.na(utils::read.table(ogs_tsv, sep = "\t", header = TRUE,
                                    stringsAsFactors = FALSE)$tree_path))
    else NA_integer_,
    if (file.exists(sc_tsv))
      nrow(utils::read.table(sc_tsv, sep = "\t", header = TRUE,
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
    else NA_integer_,
    length(hogs),
    file.exists(sp_nwk)
  )
)
knitr::kable(summary_df)
```

## Rooted species tree

```{r species-tree}
if (file.exists(sp_nwk) && requireNamespace("ape", quietly = TRUE)) {
  tr <- ape::read.tree(sp_nwk)
  op <- par(mar = c(1, 1, 1, 6))
  plot(tr, cex = 0.8, label.offset = 0.01)
  if (!is.null(tr$node.label)) {
    ape::nodelabels(tr$node.label,
                    frame = "none", cex = 0.7, adj = c(1.1, -0.4))
  }
  par(op)
} else {
  cat("_No species tree at_", sp_nwk)
}
```

## OG size distribution

```{r og-sizes}
if (file.exists(ogs_tsv)) {
  df <- utils::read.table(ogs_tsv, sep = "\t", header = TRUE,
                           stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ggplot(df, aes(x = n_members)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "#3b5b9a", color = "white") +
    scale_x_log10() +
    labs(x = "Members per OG (log scale)", y = "OG count",
         title = "Orthogroup size distribution") +
    theme_minimal()
}
```

## HOG counts per species-tree node

```{r hog-counts}
hog_rows <- lapply(hogs, function(p) {
  # Count data lines (skip 2 header comments + 1 column header)
  n <- length(readLines(p)) - 3L
  node_id <- as.integer(sub(".*N(\\d+)_.*", "\\1", basename(p)))
  data.frame(node_id = node_id, file = basename(p), n_hogs = max(n, 0L))
})
if (length(hog_rows)) {
  hd <- do.call(rbind, hog_rows)
  ggplot(hd, aes(x = factor(node_id), y = n_hogs)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#2ca02c") +
    labs(x = "Species-tree node", y = "HOGs at node",
         title = "HOG counts per internal node") +
    theme_minimal()
}
```

## Pan/core curve

```{r pan-core}
# pan_core_curve.parquet is rarefaction output: columns
#   permutation (uint16), k (uint16), pan (uint32), core (uint32)
# so we aggregate across permutations to get mean ± sd per k.
pc <- if (!is.na(dnmb_dir)) file.path(dnmb_dir, "processed", "pan_core_curve.parquet") else ""
plot_ok <- tryCatch({
  if (nzchar(pc) && file.exists(pc) && requireNamespace("arrow", quietly = TRUE)) {
    curve <- as.data.frame(arrow::read_parquet(pc))
    agg <- stats::aggregate(
      cbind(pan, core) ~ k, data = curve,
      FUN = function(x) c(mean = mean(x), sd = stats::sd(x))
    )
    plot_df <- data.frame(
      k        = agg$k,
      pan_mean = agg$pan[, "mean"], pan_sd = agg$pan[, "sd"],
      core_mean = agg$core[, "mean"], core_sd = agg$core[, "sd"]
    )
    plot_df$pan_sd[is.na(plot_df$pan_sd)]   <- 0
    plot_df$core_sd[is.na(plot_df$core_sd)] <- 0
    print(
      ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = k)) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = pan_mean - pan_sd, ymax = pan_mean + pan_sd),
                    fill = "#d62728", alpha = 0.15) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = core_mean - core_sd, ymax = core_mean + core_sd),
                    fill = "#1f77b4", alpha = 0.15) +
        geom_line(aes(y = pan_mean,  colour = "pan"),  linewidth = 0.9) +
        geom_line(aes(y = core_mean, colour = "core"), linewidth = 0.9) +
        geom_point(aes(y = pan_mean,  colour = "pan")) +
        geom_point(aes(y = core_mean, colour = "core")) +
        scale_color_manual(values = c(pan = "#d62728", core = "#1f77b4"),
                           name = "") +
        labs(x = "Genomes sampled", y = "Cluster count",
             title = "Pan / core accumulation (mean \u00b1 sd across permutations)") +
        theme_minimal()
    )
    TRUE
  } else FALSE
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("_Pan/core curve unavailable:_", conditionMessage(e))
  FALSE
})
```

## OrthoFinder-parity figures

Sidecar PDFs rendered by `run_orthofinder_like()`. Embedded here as
inline PNGs (converted with `pdftools::pdf_convert` when available);
the original PDFs remain alongside the data artifacts for high-res
downstream use.

```{r extra-figures, results = "asis"}
render_pdf_inline <- function(path, caption) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(invisible(NULL))
  png_path <- sub("\\.pdf$", ".png", path)
  if (!file.exists(png_path) && requireNamespace("pdftools", quietly = TRUE)) {
    tryCatch(
      pdftools::pdf_convert(path, format = "png", dpi = 150,
                             filenames = png_path, verbose = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
  }
  if (file.exists(png_path)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n", caption))
    cat(sprintf("![%s](%s)\n", caption, png_path))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("\n\n### %s\n\n_See `%s` (PDF preview not available)._\n",
                 caption, basename(path)))
  }
}
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "orthofinder_overview.pdf"),
                   "Run overview (tree + OG sizes + HOGs + losses)")
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "pangenome_landscape.pdf"),
                   "Pan-genome landscape (HOG occupancy + species-pair relationships)")
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "dtl_summary.pdf"),
                   "DTL reconciliation summary (overlay + distributions)")
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "duplication_burden.pdf"),
                   "Duplication burden")
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "dtl_top_ogs.pdf"),
                   "Top OGs by duplication / transfer / loss")
render_pdf_inline(file.path(out_dir, "per_og_tree_grid.pdf"),
                   "Per-OG gene-tree grid (largest OGs)")
```
